scope.target: Define commit title, body, issue-number syntax, and autonomous commit timing.
scope.dependency_radius: Agent git behavior and workflow-stage commits.
constraints: Use <type>(<scope>): <summary> when no issue number exists.
Workflow-stage commits must include Why, What, Validation, and Workflow body sections.

user_constraints: This workflow has no issue number.
Apply the policy during this workflow.

steps: Use the policy for subsequent commits in this workflow.
validation: Verify examples cover issue-number and no-issue cases.

results.summary: Added git commit policy with issue-number title syntax, no-issue fallback syntax, body format, and workflow commit timing rules.
